scripts.dev:backend: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$p=8082; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $p -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force };" && cd ../backend && mvn -DskipTests spring-boot:run
scripts.dev:all: start "backend" cmd /c "npm run dev:backend" && npm run dev
